  1. io.bloviate.db

Uses of Package
io.bloviate.db

Packages that use io.bloviate.db
Package
Description
io.bloviate.datafaker
 
io.bloviate.db
 
io.bloviate.ext
 
io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
 
io.bloviate.testcontainers
 
io.bloviate.util
 
  • Classes in io.bloviate.db used by io.bloviate.datafaker
    Class
    Description
    ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Builds the DataGenerator used to override generation for a single column.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.db used by io.bloviate.db
    Class
    Description
    Column
    Represents a database column with its complete metadata.
    ColumnConfiguration
    Overrides the data generator used for a single column, replacing the generator that would otherwise be auto-detected from the column's JDBC type.
    ColumnConstraint
    A value constraint captured for a column — the machine-readable part of a CHECK constraint or an ENUM/domain's allowed values — so the fill engine can generate values that satisfy it instead of values a constraint would reject (issue #479).
    ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Builds the DataGenerator used to override generation for a single column.
    CommitStrategy
    How a TableFiller commits the rows it inserts.
    CommitStrategy.Mode
    The available commit modes.
    Database
    Represents a database instance with its metadata and contained tables.
    DatabaseConfiguration
    Configuration settings for database filling operations.
    DatabaseFiller
    Main entry point for filling database tables with generated data.
    DatabaseFiller.Builder
    Builder for constructing DatabaseFiller instances.
    Fillable
    Contract for components that populate a target with generated data.
    ForeignKey
    A foreign-key relationship: the columns of one table that reference the PrimaryKey of another.
    KeyColumn
    One column of a possibly-composite key, paired with its position within that key.
    PrimaryKey
    The primary key of a database table — the column or columns that uniquely identify each row.
    Table
    Represents a database table with its columns, keys, and relationships.
    TableConfiguration
    Configuration for customizing how a specific table should be filled with data.
    TableFiller
    Fills a database table with generated data.
    TableFiller.Builder
    Builder for constructing TableFiller instances.
  • Classes in io.bloviate.db used by io.bloviate.ext
    Class
    Description
    Column
    Represents a database column with its complete metadata.
    ColumnConstraint
    A value constraint captured for a column — the machine-readable part of a CHECK constraint or an ENUM/domain's allowed values — so the fill engine can generate values that satisfy it instead of values a constraint would reject (issue #479).

    Class
    Description
    TableConfiguration
    Configuration for customizing how a specific table should be filled with data.

    Configuration for customizing how a specific table should be filled with data.

    Represents a database column with its complete metadata.
